description: The percentage labels on the three pie slices use wildly inconsistent formatting: the 0–14 slice shows a rounded whole number in tiny font (8pt), the 15–59 slice displays three decimal places in an oversized font (18pt), and the 60+ slice uses the standard one decimal place at a normal size. This haphazard mix of precision levels and font sizes makes the chart look unprofessional and can confuse readers about which format to trust or compare.
